subject: [PATCH v3 2/4] sunrpc: use per-net counts in svc_seq_show()

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch updates the svc_seq_show() function to read procedure call counts from per-network-namespace arrays instead of global ones. This change allows /proc/net/rpc/nfsd to report procedure call counts on a per-network-namespace basis, which is useful for monitoring and debugging purposes. The patch only affects the nfsd service, as it always allocates the necessary data structures in its initialization code.
